title: orchis nigra
intro: Orchis nigra, also known as the black helleborin or black orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Orchis nigra include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat kidney stones. In herbal preparations, Orchis nigra is often used in the form of tincture, powder, or infusion, typically in small doses due to its potential toxicity.
